Let's consider the definition of `iIndepFun`:

We need to show this equality holds for our specific `f` and `őľ`.

To prove this, we need to understand the structure of the sets involved. Let's think about what `f ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' s` looks like. `f` is `fun p => rewardByCount p.1 p.2`. So `f ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' s` is the set of all inputs `p` such that `rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ‚ąą s`.

Now, `f ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' s ‚ą© t` is the set of all inputs `p` such that `rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ‚ąą s` and `p ‚ąą t`.

Similarly, `f ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' s` is the set of all inputs `p` such that `rewardByCount p.1 p.2 ‚ąą s`.

And `őľ t` is the measure of the set `t`.

The key insight is that `iIndepFun` is equivalent to the function `f` being independent of the underlying probability space with respect to the measure `őľ`. In other words, the value of `f` does not affect the measure `őľ`.

lemma measurable_comap_indicator_stepsUntil_eq (a : őĪ) (m n : ‚Ąē) :
    Measurable[MeasurableSpace.comap (fun ŌČ : ‚Ąē ‚Üí őĪ √ó ‚ĄĚ ‚Ü¶ (hist (n-1) ŌČ, arm n ŌČ)) inferInstance]
      ({ŌČ | stepsUntil a m ŌČ = ‚ÜĎn}.indicator fun _ ‚Ü¶ 1) := by
  let k : ((Iic (n - 1) ‚Üí őĪ √ó ‚ĄĚ) √ó őĪ) ‚Üí (‚Ąē ‚Üí őĪ √ó ‚ĄĚ) := fun x i ‚Ü¶
    if hi : i ‚ąą Iic (n - 1) then (x.1 ‚ü®i, hi‚ü©) else if i = n then (x.2, 0) else (a, 0)
  have hk : Measurable k := by
    unfold k
    rw [measurable_pi_iff]
    intro i
    split_ifs <;> fun_prop
  let ŌÜ : ((Iic (n - 1) ‚Üí őĪ √ó ‚ĄĚ) √ó őĪ) ‚Üí ‚Ąē := fun x ‚Ü¶ if stepsUntil a m (k x) = ‚ÜĎn then 1 else 0
  have hŌÜ : Measurable ŌÜ :=
    Measurable.ite ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  suffices {ŌČ | stepsUntil a m ŌČ = ‚ÜĎn}.indicator (fun x ‚Ü¶ 1)
      = ŌÜ ‚ąė fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ (hist (n - 1) ŌČ, arm n ŌČ) from this ‚Ėł measurable_comp_comap _ hŌÜ
  ext ŌČ
  classical
  simp only [Set.indicator_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Function.comp_apply, ŌÜ]
  congr 1
  rw [stepsUntil_eq_congr]
  intro i hin
  simp only [arm, mem_Iic, hist, dite_eq_ite, k, action]
  grind

lemma measurable_indicator_stepsUntil_eq (a : őĪ) (m n : ‚Ąē) :
    Measurable ({ŌČ : ‚Ąē ‚Üí őĪ √ó ‚ĄĚ | stepsUntil a m ŌČ = ‚ÜĎn}.indicator fun _ ‚Ü¶ 1) := by
  refine (measurable_comap_indicator_stepsUntil_eq a m n).mono ?_ le_rfl
  refine Measurable.comap_le ?_
  fun_prop

lemma measurableSet_stepsUntil_eq (a : őĪ) (m n : ‚Ąē) :
    MeasurableSet[MeasurableSpace.comap (fun ŌČ : ‚Ąē ‚Üí őĪ √ó ‚ĄĚ ‚Ü¶ (hist (n-1) ŌČ, arm n ŌČ)) inferInstance]
      {ŌČ : ‚Ąē ‚Üí őĪ √ó ‚ĄĚ | stepsUntil a m ŌČ = ‚ÜĎn} := by
  let mProd := MeasurableSpace.comap (fun ŌČ : ‚Ąē ‚Üí őĪ √ó ‚ĄĚ ‚Ü¶ (hist (n-1) ŌČ, arm n ŌČ)) inferInstance
  suffices Measurable[mProd] ({ŌČ | stepsUntil a m ŌČ = ‚ÜĎn}.indicator (fun x ‚Ü¶ 1)) by
    rwa [measurable_indicator_const_iff] at this
  exact measurable_comap_indicator_stepsUntil_eq a m n
